---
---

## One figure per chunk (unnamed)

```{r}
plot(1:10)
```

## Multiple figures from one chunk (unnamed)

```{r}
plot(1:10)
plot(10:1)
```

## One figure per chunk (named)

```{r named-single}
plot(1:10)
```

## Multiple figures from one named chunk

```{r named-multi}
plot(1:10)
plot(10:1)
```

## Chunk figure with caption

```{r with-cap}
#| fig-cap: "A plot caption"
plot(1:10)
```
